title: Dials Decide the Battle
description: Enel’s power and authority become clearer as Skypiea’s people and warriors are forced to live under his judgment.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Enel, Wyper, McKinley, Eneru, Shandia warrior. Enel’s power and authority become clearer as Skypiea’s people and warriors are forced to live under his judgment.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: But I do not know the details.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Sometimes attempt to escape on ships.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Could he have heard that just now?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: tyrannizing...? No. It is worse than that.

dialogue.text: Through this process, the citizens have developed
